impact: This gives the PP&D supervisor a deterministic recovery policy for repeated SyntaxError/py_compile failures: stop retrying broad blocked tasks, split them into syntax-first import tests, minimal fixtures, and smallest implementation tasks, then continue independent fixture-first work. That directly addresses the blocked source-freshness and missing-information validation loops without implementing the PP&D domain tasks or touching private/live artifacts.
summary: Add supervisor repair guidance for syntax-failure recovery and blocked-task selection.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 2 task(s) are blocked: Task checkbox-54: Add a source freshness fixture that classifies stale PP&D guidance, changed content hashes, removed pages, and recrawl priority without performing a live recrawl.; Task checkbox-55: Add a fixture-only change report renderer for public PP&D source freshness results that summarizes changed requirements, new or removed links, and affected permit-process fixtures with citation references.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
